Cleaned up LineIterator changes include * Removed the IOIterator interface, it can be added back later when there is more than one Iterator implementations with a close method. * Doesn't automatically close the Reader at EOF. * made LineIterator final because the hasNext method isn't implemented in a subclassable way. * constructor throws an IllegaArgumentException, not a NPE when the argument is bogus.
